name: ltblog-vendored-assets
description: Tracks vendored frontend dependencies. Run `npm install && npm run vendor` to refresh assets/css/ and assets/fonts/ from node_modules.

scripts.vendor: npm run vendor:bulma && npm run vendor:fontawesome && npm run vendor:webfonts
scripts.vendor:fontawesome: cp node_modules/font-awesome/css/font-awesome.min.css assets/css/font-awesome.min.css && mkdir -p assets/fonts && cp node_modules/font-awesome/fonts/fontawesome-webfont.* assets/fonts/
